title: [CI:DOCS] apiv2 fix volumes not included field
body:
Do not use volume from docker since UsageData field is not need. It's nullable in docker API and expensive to add.

Signed-off-by: Qi Wang <qiwan@redhat.com>

comments.body: Should this PR really have the `[CI:DOCS]` tag in the subject?
